---
title: "Client Report - Project 0: Introduction"
subtitle: "Course DS 250"
author: "[STUDENT NAME]"
format:
  html:
    self-contained: true
    page-layout: full
    title-block-banner: true
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    toc-location: body
    number-sections: false
    html-math-method: katex
    code-fold: true
    code-summary: "Show the code"
    code-overflow: wrap
    code-copy: hover
    code-tools:
        source: false
        toggle: true
        caption: See code
execute: 
  warning: false
    
---

```{python}
import polars as pl
import numpy as np
from lets_plot import *

LetsPlot.setup_html(isolated_frame=True)
```


```{python}
# Learn morea about Code Cells: https://quarto.org/docs/reference/cells/cells-jupyter.html

# Include and execute your code here
from palmerpenguins import load_penguins
penguins = load_penguins()
```

## QUESTION|TASK 1

__Recreate the first table displayed at [PY4DS: CH2 Data Visualization](https://aeturrell.github.io/python4DS/data-visualise.html)__


```{python}
# To recreate the table, all you should need to do is run this code, no editing required
penguins

```


## QUESTION|TASK 2

__Recreate an example chart from [PY4DS: CH2 Data Visualization](https://aeturrell.github.io/python4DS/data-visualise.html), in the First Steps section. Specifically, recreate the chart in the subsection labelled "Ultimate Goal", by copying the code above the chart and pasting it in the cell below__


```{python}
# Include and execute your code here


```
